title: Street mile draws star athletes
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Seventy-seven athletes have so far entered for Saturday's inaugural Plett Street Mile race, including some top runners.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - Seventy-seven athletes have so far entered for Saturday's inaugural Plett Street Mile race, including some top runners."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Among these are rising star Carina Viljoen, the runaway winner of the recent George Street Mile in the Ladies Open and Junior Ladies races, who has been described as a \"top prospect\"."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Carina will be on holiday at her parents' holiday home in Nature's Valley and is a confirmed entrant for Saturday's street mile.","html":"Carina will be on holiday at her parents' holiday home in Nature's Valley and is a confirmed entrant for Saturday's street mile."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In all, there will be six races in various categories, with the top women's and men's events attracting 30 runners.","html":"In all, there will be six races in various categories, with the top women's and men's events attracting 30 runners."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"FamousAthletics South Africa and Athletics South Western Districts are supporting the Plett Street Mile.","html":"Famous
Athletics South Africa and Athletics South Western Districts are supporting the Plett Street Mile."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"This type of event is hosted in many cities around the world with the most famous being the New York 5th Avenue mile event."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"While the Plett Street Mile will host a top professional field, it is aimed at being a large community event, drawing runners of all ages and abilities, from youth to masters, competing in their own races on the day.","html":"While the Plett Street Mile will host a top professional field, it is aimed at being a large community event, drawing runners of all ages and abilities, from youth to masters, competing in their own races on the day."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"We hope to identify local talent that could someday compete with the best at the 5th Avenue Mile,\" said Ray Wicksell, one of the organisers."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This has been done by a South African in the past - Sydney Maree, who set a record that stood for 43 years until it was broken in 2024.","html":"This has been done by a South African in the past - Sydney Maree, who set a record that stood for 43 years until it was broken in 2024."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"This legend will be in our town for the inaugural event and will be signing autographs and meeting our local runners on the day,\" said Wicksell.","html":"\"This legend will be in our town for the inaugural event and will be signing autographs and meeting our local runners on the day,\" said Wicksell."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read previous articles:","html":"Read previous articles: "},{"type":"list","items":["Plett Street Mile set for December","Street Mile first for Plett"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
